blended.narrative: Stowe is expecting dry conditions over the next 48 hours. Looking ahead, 17 inches possible over the next 14 days. Mild temps with highs near 48°F.

daily_summary.narrative: Thursday: 3.5" of snow, highs of 50°F. Expect wet, heavy snow.
Saturday: 2.1" of snow, highs of 29°F. Expect variable conditions.
Monday: 6" of snow, highs of 37°F. Expect wet, heavy snow.
